basic_details.job_title: HLL Associate Manager / Junior Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years (as on 01-06-2026) Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will be as per Government of India directives.

salary_details.details: Associate Manager: Basic Rs. 25000-45000, Gross Rs. 50275, CTC Rs. 7.22 Lakhs (approx Non-Metro) Junior Manager: Basic Rs. 20000-40000, Gross Rs. 40220, CTC Rs. 5.83 Lakhs (approx Non-Metro)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HLL Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HLL Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) positions?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the HLL Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) positions is 24 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) post is CA / CMA / MBA (Finance) obtained through a regular course of study. Ensure you meet this criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 40 years as of 01 June 2026. Age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/PwD categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) post in this recruitment drive by HLL Lifecare.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for Associate Manager ranges from Rs. 25000-45000 (Basic) with a Gross of Rs. 50275 and CTC of Rs. 7.22 Lakhs. For Junior Manager, it's Rs. 20000-40000 (Basic) with a Gross of Rs. 40220 and CTC of Rs. 5.83 Lakhs (approx Non-Metro).

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the HLL Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve an Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the Associate Manager / Junior Manager (Finance & Accounts) positions is Contractual. This means the employment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download the notification for detailed information before applying.
